title: Spicy Charred Shoyu Ramen
description: A fusion of Japanese and Thai flavors, this spicy charred shoyu ramen is a twist on the classic dish.
instructions: Cook the ramen according to the package instructions.
In a small saucepan, combine the shoyu and charred jalapeño. Bring to a simmer over low heat.
Add the sliced cucumber to the saucepan and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until slightly tender.
To assemble the dish, place the cooked ramen in a bowl and top with the cucumber and jalapeño mixture.
Garnish with thinly sliced Japanese scallions.
